headline: Certa Named A Leader in the First Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Third-Party Risk Management Tools
summary: Certa has been named a Leader in the inaugural Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Third-Party Risk Management Tools for Assurance Leaders*. The Magic Quadrant evaluates software providers on Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. As Gartner notes, "Leaders combine advanced capabilities, such as AI-native risk detection and continuous monitoring" and "anticipate emerging market needs—often introducing new features before demand."

headline: Gartner (IT): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for Gartner. The stock has dropped 38.2% and now trades at $150.75, rattling many shareholders. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

raw.headline: Gartner (IT): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
raw.summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for Gartner. The stock has dropped 38.2% and now trades at $150.75, rattling many shareholders. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Government Contracts and Robust Liquidity Fuel Maximus' Growth
summary: MMS benefits from strong government partnerships, cash flow and dividend payouts, but regulatory risks and heavy government contract reliance dampen growth.

headline: Business Process Services & AI-Driven Products Fuel Genpact's Growth
summary: G rides on AI-driven BPO growth and strong cash returns, but regional concentration, rising costs and competition weigh on scalability and growth.

headline: Optro Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Third-Party Risk Management Tools for Assurance Leaders
summary: Optro (*formerly AuditBoard), the leading AI-powered GRC platform empowering enterprises to transform risk into opportunity, today announced it has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Third-Party Risk Management Tools for Assurance Leaders, positioned the furthest on the "Completeness of Vision" axis. headline: Semiconductor industry revenue to hit $1.3 trillion in 2026 as memory crunch hits consumers
summary: Global semiconductor revenue will top $1.3 trillion in 2026, according to Gartner.

headline: NTT DATA Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for 4G and 5G Private Mobile Network Services
summary: TOKYO, April 08, 2026--NTT DATA, a global leader in AI, digital business and technology services, today announced that it has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for 4G and 5G Private Mobile Network Services. Gartner evaluated companies based on their Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute in the rapidly evolving private mobile network market.
